title: FOSTER CARE AND ADOPTION - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS AID FOSTER CARE AND ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program Information Coordinator (PIC) provides information to families interested in foster care or adoption. Staff guides families through the certification and home study process for foster care and adoption programs. Foster parents receive ongoing training to maintain certification and support. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Foster parents must be age 21 or older and complete necessary training and application Hours: Family support: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Information sessions: -Infant adoption: 1st Tuesday of most months -Foster care adoption: 2nd Tuesday of the month Email (503) 222-9661 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 222-9661 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. The certification process involves meetings, home visits, references, and training. FEES: None for foster parents who receive reimbursement. Contact PIC for adoption fees. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adoption Services Adoptive Family Recruitment Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE ADOPTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BOYS & GIRLS AID
